text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head to the cafeteria for lunch and find Special
Week eating a massive helping of salad.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Phew... They said on TV that eating veggies help
with getting rid of pimples.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It's just on the back of my neck, but I'm worried
that people will laugh if they see it.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I've gotta get rid of it before the race!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sigh... But that means I'll have to eat veggies until then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Special Week's qualms about her
skincare regimen won't go away so easily.
